available_skills.name: frontend-guardian
available_skills.description: Senior frontend engineer + UX auditor. Use when reviewing frontend code, mobile UX, responsive design, accessibility, or production readiness. Trigger keywords: review, UX, mobile, responsive, accessibility, frontend audit.

available_skills.name: qa-tester
available_skills.description: QA Tester. Use when testing the application, checking for bugs, verifying features work correctly, or doing acceptance testing. Trigger keywords: test, QA, verify, bug, smoke test, regression, acceptance testing.
